name: 第一次世界大战
subject: history
domain_name: 20世纪世界史 / 20th Century World History / 20th Century World History
curriculum_points: Students will be able to analyse the long-term and short-term causes of the First World War, evaluating the relative significance of factors such as militarism, alliances, imperialism, and nationalism (HL/SL).
Students will be able to assess the social, economic, and political consequences of WWI, including the Treaty of Versailles and its impact on the post-war order.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「第一次世界大战」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Students will be able to analyse the long-term and short-term causes of the First World War, evaluating the relative sig…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Students will be able to assess the social, economic, and political consequences… 对理解「第一次世界大战」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
